project.name: Trial Lifecycle, Credit Monetization & First-Login Experience

stories.title: Add grace period columns + expanded status to organization_subscriptions
acceptance: grace_period_started_at and grace_period_ends_at columns added to organization_subscriptions
status CHECK constraint includes 'grace_period' and 'expired'
deactivation_reason column added to organizations table
Indexes created for trial_ends_at and grace_period_ends_at queries
FIX V6: Recreate missing organization_subscriptions SELECT policy (dropped in baseline_fixed)
FIX: SubscriptionStatus TypeScript type updated to include 'expired' | 'grace_period' in src/lib/types/subscription.ts
FIX: Modify deletion_scheduled_at trigger (20260205140001) to use 14 days for trial_expired, 30 days for subscription cancellation
Migration runs clean on staging

stories.title: Create check_subscription_access RPC
acceptance: RPC returns has_access, can_use_ai, status, and action for all subscription states
Handles: active, trialing, grace_period, past_due, expired, canceled, no_subscription
Returns trial_days_remaining for trialing orgs
Returns grace_days_remaining for grace period orgs
FIX: update-subscription edge function (line 138) updated to allow grace_period and expired statuses for upgrades
FIX V2: grant_subscription_credits restricted to service_role only (REVOKE EXECUTE FROM authenticated)
FIX V2: grant_onboarding_credits restricted to service_role only
FIX V2: expire_subscription_credits restricted to service_role only
Granted to authenticated (read) and service_role (write)

stories.title: Create trial-expiry-cron edge function
acceptance: Expires overdue trials → sets status to grace_period with correct dates
Expires overdue grace periods → deactivates org with deactivation_reason = 'trial_expired_no_subscription'
Sends grace day-12 warning notifications
Uses getCorsHeaders(req), pins @supabase/supabase-js@2.43.4
FIX: Uses pg_cron SQL (NOT config.toml [cron] section which doesn't exist) — schedule via migration
FIX V4: CRON_SECRET guard fails closed (reject if env var not set, not open)
FIX V3: start-free-trial patched to block re-trialing after grace_period/expired status
FIX: start-free-trial creates org_credit_balance row if not exists (prevents credit enforcement fail-open)
FIX: start-free-trial uses getCorsHeaders(req), pins @2.43.4, uses maybeSingle()

stories.title: Add trial/grace enforcement to ProtectedRoute
acceptance: ProtectedRoute checks subscription status after org active check (uses useEffect+useState pattern matching existing component, NOT React Query)
Expired trial with no subscription → redirect to /trial-expired
Grace period → allows navigation but blocks AI-action routes
New hooks: useIsInGracePeriod, useSubscriptionGate
Exempt routes: /settings/billing, /trial-expired, /auth/*, /onboarding/*
FIX: Remove TrialConversionModal expired trigger in AppLayout (keep only for approaching-expiry warnings)
FIX: isCheckingSubscription state follows existing component loading pattern
Existing users with active subscriptions completely unaffected

stories.title: Create TrialExpiredPage with plan comparison + Stripe checkout
acceptance: Shows Basic vs Pro plan comparison with pricing
Subscribe button triggers Stripe checkout (reuses createCheckoutSession)
Maybe Later button enters grace period with read-only access
Shows trial usage summary (credits used, meetings processed)
Mobile-responsive layout

stories.title: Create GracePeriodBanner in AppLayout
acceptance: Persistent top banner during grace period with days remaining
Upgrade Now CTA → /trial-expired page
Non-dismissible (but not blocking)
Shows different message based on days remaining
Only visible when subscription status is grace_period

stories.title: Update InactiveOrganizationScreen with billing messages
acceptance: Detects deactivation_reason = trial_expired_no_subscription
Shows billing-specific message instead of generic deactivation
Upgrade CTA triggers Stripe checkout directly
Existing admin/manual deactivation messages unchanged

stories.title: Add missing credit menu actions + activate draft items
acceptance: 5 new actions added: instant_replay, writing_style_analysis, fact_profile_research, battlecard_generation, linkedin_enrichment
9 draft items activated: notetaker_bot, pre_meeting_brief, transcript_search, deal_proposal, coaching_analysis, deal_intelligence, lead_qualification, competitor_intel, deal_rescue_plan
All prices match PRD credit menu audit table
Migration is idempotent (ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING)

stories.title: Add pre-flight checkCreditBalance to costTracking.ts
acceptance: checkCreditBalance called at top of logAICostEvent before any AI call
Returns blocked: true with reason if balance insufficient
Fixes all 63 edge functions that import costTracking in one change
FIX V1: deduct_credits_ordered validates p_amount > 0 (prevents negative amount exploit for unlimited credits)
FIX V5: org_credit_balance UPDATE RLS restricted to specific columns (prevents arbitrary balance setting)
Grace threshold still respected (balance >= -graceThreshold)
Existing tests pass

stories.title: Add subscription status check to costTracking.ts
acceptance: AI calls blocked when subscription status is grace_period or expired
AI calls allowed for active, trialing, and past_due status
Returns clear error: subscription_inactive with upgrade URL
No regression for orgs without subscription rows (trial users during trial)

stories.title: Update Basic plan to 100 credits/month
acceptance: subscription_plans.features.bundled_credits updated to 100 for Basic plan
stripe-webhook handleInvoicePaid grants 100 credits for Basic, 250 for Pro
grant_subscription_credits description distinguishes Basic vs Pro
Existing Pro plan credit grants unchanged

stories.title: Wire useRequireCredits into production components
acceptance: useCreditGatedAction hook created
Copilot chat input checks credits before sending
Meeting summary generation checks credits
Follow-up email generation checks credits
Contact/company enrichment checks credits
Blocked actions show toast with top-up CTA

stories.title: Create CreditTopUpPrompt modal + low-balance toast
acceptance: Modal shows 3 credit packs with prices and Buy buttons
Buy button triggers Stripe checkout for credit pack
Low-balance toast fires when credits < 20% of monthly allowance
Zero-balance modal fires when action blocked
FIX: Wire up existing LowBalanceBanner (already imported in AppLayout but never rendered)
Auto top-up link in modal footer

stories.title: Audit and patch 17 edge functions bypassing costTracking
acceptance: All 17 identified edge functions that call Anthropic directly now import and use costTracking
Functions patched: slack-post-meeting, agent-morning-briefing, agent-competitive-intel, and 14 others
Each function pre-checks credit balance before AI call
Each function logs cost event after AI call
No regressions in existing functionality

stories.title: Create fetch-recent-meeting helper for Fathom + Fireflies
acceptance: Fathom: fetches most recent recording with transcript via API
Fireflies: fetches most recent transcript via GraphQL
Returns normalized { transcript, title, date, duration, participants } or null
Tries up to 3 meetings to find one with valid transcript
Skips transcripts < 200 words
Handles API errors gracefully (returns null)

stories.title: Create instant-replay orchestrator edge function
acceptance: Accepts user_id, org_id, notetaker_source
Calls fetch-recent-meeting to get transcript
Creates meeting record if not exists (checks with maybeSingle first)
Runs pipeline: structured summary + action items + follow-up email draft
Streams progress via SSE (step events + result event)
FIX: Orchestrator charges credits ONCE upfront via logAICostEvent with action_id = instant_replay
FIX: Child pipeline calls use service role key with skip_credit_check flag to prevent triple deduction
Sets instant_replay_completed flag on user_onboarding_progress
90-second soft timeout — returns partial results
Uses getCorsHeaders(req), pins @supabase/supabase-js@2.43.4
Follow-up email is DRAFT only — never auto-sends

stories.title: Add notetaker_connection step to V2 onboarding flow
acceptance: notetaker_connection added to OnboardingV2Step type
Added to VALID_STEPS array in OnboardingV2.tsx
renderStep() has case for notetaker_connection
SkillsConfigStep moveNext() routes to notetaker_connection instead of complete
FIX BLOCKER: saveAllSkills() split into persistSkillsToServer() (save only) — no longer sets step to complete
FIX: handleSkipAll() also updated to route to notetaker_connection instead of complete

stories.title: Create NotetakerConnectionStep component
acceptance: Shows available notetakers: Fathom, Fireflies, 60 Notetaker
OAuth connection flow using existing integration hooks
On successful connection → triggers Instant Replay panel
Skip button proceeds to complete step
Matches V2 onboarding visual design patterns

stories.title: Create InstantReplayPanel with SSE progress
acceptance: Shows meeting title + date with 'Run Instant Replay?' opt-in button
Shows credit cost estimate before running
Mission-control-style progressive loading (checkmarks per stage)
Results render progressively: summary first, then action items, then email
Tabbed view: Summary | Action Items | Follow-Up Email
'This happens automatically' framing + continue button
Graceful fallback for all edge cases (no meetings, timeout, etc.)
Follow-up email clearly labeled 'This is a preview — not sent'

stories.title: Add instant_replay_completed flag to user_onboarding_progress
acceptance: instant_replay_completed boolean column added (default false)
instant_replay_meeting_id uuid column added (FK to meetings)
FIX: source_type CHECK constraint on meetings table updated to include 'fireflies'
Migration is additive (no existing data affected)

stories.title: Install react-joyride + create ProductTour component
acceptance: react-joyride installed and configured
ProductTour component with 5 tour steps
Tour triggers on first dashboard visit after onboarding completion
Dismissible, doesn't re-show (persisted in localStorage)
Follows existing Tailwind/shadcn styling

stories.title: Add data-tour attributes to nav items + key UI elements
acceptance: data-tour='dashboard' on dashboard section
data-tour='meetings' on meetings nav item
data-tour='copilot' on copilot panel/button
data-tour='credits' on credit balance indicator
data-tour='settings' on settings nav item
No visual changes — attributes only

stories.title: Create CreditSystemExplainer component
acceptance: Card component explaining: what credits are, how to earn, how to buy, what they unlock
Shows current balance and plan allowance
Sample actions with credit costs
Dismissible with localStorage persistence
Shown on dashboard after onboarding OR in replay completion flow
Link to Settings > Credits for full details

stories.title: Enhance ActivationChecklist with credit + notetaker items
acceptance: New item: Connect your notetaker → /settings/integrations
New item: Experience Meeting Intelligence → /meetings (ties to Instant Replay)
Visibility window extended from 7 days to 14 days (matches trial)
Progress bar updated with new item count

stories.title: Extend activation tracking with new milestone events
acceptance: New events: notetaker_connected, instant_replay_completed, credits_topped_up, tour_completed
Events fire at appropriate points in the respective flows
Encharge automation tags updated

stories.title: Add Customers tab to existing SaasAdminDashboard
acceptance: New 'Customers' tab added to existing SaasAdminDashboard at /platform/customers (no route collision)
Table: org name, plan, status, trial end, grace end, credits, MRR, owner email
Filters: status, trial ending soon, plan, credit level
Default sort: trial end date (soonest first)
Matches existing SaasAdminDashboard tab styling and patterns

stories.title: Add trial extension + credit grant actions to customer rows
acceptance: Action menu per row: extend trial, grant credits, send email, deactivate
Extend trial updates trial_ends_at via service role
Grant credits uses existing grantCredits service
Confirmation modals for destructive actions

stories.title: Create trial email templates (7 emails)
acceptance: 7 email templates: Day 0 welcome, Day 3 value, Day 7 behavior-segmented, Day 10 urgency, Day 12 final push, Day 14 expiry, Grace day 12 last chance
Templates use Encharge/email service patterns
Personalization variables: org name, user name, credits used, features accessed
Unsubscribe link included

stories.title: Wire email triggers into trial-expiry-cron + activation tracking
acceptance: trial-expiry-cron sends Day 14 email on trial expiry
trial-expiry-cron sends Grace day 12 email on grace warning
Activation tracking sends Day 0, 3, 7, 10, 12 emails via Encharge automation
Behavior-segmented Day 7 email checks activation milestones

stories.title: In-app trial countdown badge + upgrade modal
acceptance: Trial countdown badge visible from day 10 in top nav (org admins only)
Badge shows 'X days left' with upgrade link
Day 12-14: one-time upgrade modal on login (dismissible, localStorage)
Modal shows plan comparison with subscribe CTA
Badge hidden for active subscribers
